frameworks.name: divisive normalization
frameworks.one_line: Current value is divided by the average of recently observed values

frameworks.name: adaptive value coding
frameworks.one_line: Extends neural adaptive value coding to behavioral valuation

frameworks.name: temporal context effects in decision making
frameworks.one_line: Links valuation history dependence to broader context effects

frameworks.name: perceptual adaptation
frameworks.one_line: Frames valuation adaptation as analogous to perceptual context effects

core_question: Does human behavioral valuation dynamically adapt to the recent history of observed values?
key_assumptions: Subjective value can be operationalized from human valuation reports
Recent reward environment statistics shape current value representations
Divisive normalization captures both spatial and temporal context effects
manipulations: Varied the history of previously observed item values
Examined how average recent value influences current valuations
key_findings: Current valuations vary inversely with the average value of recently observed items
Human valuation adapts to the history of previous values
Divisive normalization captures the dynamics of adaptive valuation
interpretations: Adaptation is a universal feature of neural information processing
Divisive normalization unifies temporal and spatial context effects across perception and economic choice
